important_sanitized_conflicts: Old Ray->Akira hidden relationship wording with romantic subtext was not carried as canon; replaced with family/protective attachment, control and duty.
Old Raiden/Yumi wording tying conscious engagement chronology to Akira was not inserted as Raiden dynamic knowledge; Raiden knows Yumi engagement as a contract but does not connect it to Akira.
Calendar facts, route facts and note/letter facts remain non-NPC knowledge unless scene/source gives them.
notes: This package intentionally keeps a migrated_static_knowledge_snapshot inside each character_memory file, so scattered old knowledge is not lost.
Later you can clean permanent facts back into characters/<id>/knowledge.yaml and keep only dynamic/start-state facts in character_memory.
The migrated snapshots are guards, not permission to reveal secrets in POV or dialogue. Disclosure rules still apply.
